mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vaccine_record ( animal_id, animal_name, vaccine_name, vaccine_type, dose, inoculation_date, next_inoculation_date, vet_name ) VALUES ( #{animalId}, #{animalName}, #{vaccineName}, #{vaccineType}, #{dose}, #{inoculationDate}, #{nextInoculationDate}, #{vetName} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vaccine_record
animal_id = #{animalId},
animal_name = #{animalName},
vaccine_name = #{vaccineName},
vaccine_type = #{vaccineType},
dose = #{dose},
inoculation_date = #{inoculationDate},
next_inoculation_date = #{nextInoculationDate},
vet_name = #{vetName},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, animal_id AS animalId, animal_name AS animalName, vaccine_name AS vaccineName, vaccine_type AS vaccineType, dose, inoculation_date AS inoculationDate, next_inoculation_date AS nextInoculationDate, vet_name AS vetName, is_deleted AS isDeleted, create_time AS createTime FROM vaccine_record WHERE id = #{id}
